title: Make Kisses
description: Just a small mod that make possible to kiss your "other half" ingame
body:
I created this mod just for my gf.

It's great if this mod helped you out too :)

Works by keybind in "Multiplayer" category ("R" default key)

![mod showcase](https://imgur.com/zDWqyDf.gif)

 

Developed by Kitoglav, ❤️Inspired❤️ by Muffch.

2024, Macarons Team


If you have any questions - you can PM me or write in discord (Kitoglav)
